message:
fix(heredoc): correct shebang parsing for interpreter arguments

- Fix from_shebang() to use first token instead of last (was failing for
  shebangs with flags like #!/bin/bash -e, #!/usr/bin/env python3 -u)
- Add tests for shebangs with interpreter flags
- Fix clippy unnecessary_map_or lint in from_command()
- Refactor from_command() to use exact matching for interpreter names
  (prevents false positives like "shebang" matching "sh")
- Add tests for versioned interpreters (python3.11, node18, etc.)
- Improve here-string extraction to handle nested quotes correctly
- Add tests for empty heredocs and nested quotes in here-strings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
